name: SSH Brute Force Detection
description: Detects brute force attacks: 5+ failed SSH login attempts from the same source IP within a 5-minute window
false_positive_guidance: Legitimate administrator forgotten password on management hosts
remediation_steps: 1. Check if source IP is internal (admin activity) or external (attack)
2. If external: add to firewall block list temporarily
3. Check if any subsequent login succeeded (see rule 100400)
4. Review targeted username(s) for privilege level
5. Document in ticketing system with evidence
